name: SIMOGRANTS
description: Autonomous multi-agent system for evaluating Ethereum public goods using Simocratic stakeholder evaluation and Stigmergic Quadratic Funding

agents.name: SIMO
agents.description: Lead agent — sprint planning, delegation, integration, submission

agents.name: collector-agent
agents.description: 7 async collectors for Web3 data sources

agents.name: mechanism-agent
agents.description: SQF formula, pheromone tracker, PageRank, anti-Goodhart

agents.name: blockchain-agent

safety_guardrails: Never log or print API keys
Never request or handle private keys
Validate all transaction parameters before execution
Rate limit all external API calls
Retry with backoff on API failures
Anti-Goodhart dimension rotation prevents metric gaming
All evaluations produce verifiable on-chain receipts
tracks: Mechanism Design for Public Goods Evaluation (Octant)
Agents for Public Goods Data Collection (Octant)
Agents for Public Goods Data Analysis (Octant)
Let the Agent Cook — No Humans Required (Protocol Labs)
Best Use Case with Agentic Storage (Filecoin Foundation)
